final:
// // When both the enable (EN) and test enable (TE) signals are inactive, the output ENCLK is set to the value of input D at the rising edge of the clock (CLK).
module top_module(
  input CLK,
  input EN,
  input TE,
  input D,
  output reg ENCLK
);always @(posedge CLK) begin
    if (EN && TE) begin
      ENCLK <= D;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When both the enable (EN) and test enable (TE) signals are inactive, the output ENCLK is set to the value of input D at the rising edge of the clock (CLK).
